message:
fix(node): NaN/Inf guards in reputation scoring, stake computation, and bounded schema versions

- reputation_graph_apis: guard base_score with is_finite() to prevent
  NaN fallback loop in compute_score()
- atc_participation_weighting: validate stake.amount >= 0 and is_finite
  before ln_1p() (negative amounts produce NaN), clamp rep.score to [0,1]
- frankensqlite_adapter: bound schema_versions Vec at 1024 entries with
  oldest-first eviction (was the only unbounded collection in the file)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
